questions.question: Define semaphore and explain wait and signal operations with their implementations (both busy-wait and blocking versions).
How can semaphores be used for: (a) mutual exclusion, (b) process ordering/synchronization? Show code for both.
keyPoints: (a) Binary semaphore = 1, wait before CS, signal after
(b) Semaphore = 0, signal after S1, wait before S2

questions.question: Differentiate between binary semaphore and counting semaphore. Give appropriate use cases for each.
keyPoints: Counting: 0 to N, for resource pools
